data.bio: Driven by curiosity and purpose, I blend technical ambition with creative passions such as modelling, competitive bodybuilding, and gaming event management... I believe in self-discipline, divine purpose, and high-performance living — consistently pushing myself to grow from within and to elevate my level of self-awareness.

Attirée par l’image et l’esthétique depuis toujours, j’ai développé une passion pour l’univers visuel qui s’est construite naturellement au fil du temps. Le mannequinat est devenu pour moi un moyen d’expression, me permettant de transmettre une énergie, une attitude et une émotion à travers chaque pose.

Inspirée par le lifestyle côtier et le bien-être, j’aime évoluer dans des projets qui reflètent une vision à la fois douce, forte et intemporelle. Mon approche repose sur la simplicité, la confiance et l’harmonie entre le corps, la lumière et l’environnement.

data.name: Ivan Bon
data.bio: My name is Ivan Bon. I’m 34 and modeling is something I genuinely care about. Coming from football and boxing, discipline and hard work are part of who I am, and that mindset follows me on every shoot. I enjoy expressing strength, emotion, and character through images, and I take pride in being reliable, focused, and easy to work with. For me, modeling isn’t just about looks — it’s about presence, attitude, and telling a story.

data.bio:
I am a self-taught fashion designer and founder of a swimwear and resort wear brand that I design and create independently.
Needless to mention that I am passionate about fashion and modeling! Alongside building my brand as a young entrepreneur, I aspire to develop my modeling career and gain more experience in front of the camera.

I am a fashion and commercial model with experience working with both international beauty brands and regional fashion houses. I have modeled for MAC Cosmetics and Kérastase by L’Oréal Paris, and have also walked the runway for Mauritius Fashion Week on two occasions. My work includes collaborations with brands and companies such as Axelle Cuts, DIM Paris, Fashion House, Hers, Oummi Dressing (Réunion), and the Ministry of Tourism Mauritius and was featured on the cover of Newstyle Magazine. 

In addition to runway and brand campaigns, I have also worked on commercial productions, including a campaign for 361. These experiences have helped me develop strong confidence in front of the camera, versatility in different styles of modeling, and the ability to represent brands authentically.

What makes me unique is my ability to combine elegance, adaptability, and professionalism while bringing personality and presence to every project. I aspire to continue growing in the fashion and beauty industry, working with international brands and expanding my portfolio through editorial, runway, and commercial modeling.

data.bio:
I’m 22 years old and have had the chance to work with local shops and take part in university fashion shows. I’m interested in exploring modeling as a creative space where I can learn, grow, and express myself. Representation is important to me, especially when it comes to faces, body types, and hair textures that aren’t always seen, and I’d love to be part of that shift.

I’m a genuinely happy and joyful person, and I bring that energy into everything I do. I give my full effort to whatever I commit to, and modeling is something I truly love from the bottom of my heart. Being given the opportunity to pursue this professionally would make me incredibly grateful, and I know I would pour all my passion and positivity into making the most of it.

data.name: Tia Summer
data.bio: Hi, I’m Tia. A fashion model with a love for creativity and self-expression. I’ve worked across fashion, beauty, and lifestyle projects, and I enjoy bringing confidence and energy to every shoot. Whether it’s on the runway or in front of the camera, I aim to showcase elegance while keeping things authentic and unique.

I recently completed my final semester toward a degree in Marketing and currently work as a personal coach. My journey into coaching—and now modeling—stems from a deeply personal transformation. I once struggled with my weight and self-image, but through dedication and self-belief, I turned my life around. Today, I help others do the same, guiding them to discover the strength and confidence they already carry within.

My first modeling experience was last year, during a villa photoshoot, and it opened my eyes to how powerful self-expression through imagery can be. I’m still learning to become more comfortable in front of the camera, but I see that as part of the adventure—an opportunity to continue growing and redefining how I see myself.

What makes me unique is the story behind my confidence: it wasn’t inherited, it was built. I want to model not just clothes or products, but the idea that transformation is possible—that the person you dream of becoming might be closer than you think.

If I could speak to my past self, I’d tell him: You’d never believe where we are now. And I’d smile, knowing that every challenge led me to this moment.

I’m Aurélie, a model who thrives on creativity and self-expression. I love stepping into different moods, whether it’s the elegance of high fashion or the raw edge of street style. For me, modeling is more than just an image, it’s about capturing energy, emotion, and a story that stays with people long after the photo is taken.
data.name: Aurelie

data.bio:
My name is Victoria Philippe Ruth Claire Walys, I am 23 years old and I’ve been modeling for 5 years in Mauritius. I am a versatile and confident model with experience in commercial, lifestyle, and brand-focused campaigns. With a natural on-camera presence and a strong understanding of visual storytelling, I bring authenticity and elegance to every project I’m part of.
Having collaborated with well-known brands like Jennyfer, Garnier, and more and shopping destinations, I am comfortable in front of both camera and video, adapting seamlessly to fashion, beauty, and lifestyle concepts. My background as a content creator allows me to quickly understand brand vision and deliver results that truly connect with audiences.
What sets me apart is my expressive personality, professionalism, and ability to connect naturally with the camera while embodying a brand’s identity. I bring energy, reliability, and creativity to every shoot.
My career aspiration is to continue growing as a model while inspiring short models, work with international brands, and expand into high-impact commercial and fashion campaigns while building a strong personal brand.

data.bio:
I started building my modeling portfolio a few years ago, but I had to pause due to academic commitments and time constraints. However, I never stopped working in the field.
Since 2021, I have been working as a model hostess for various events, particularly at high-profile events, and also as a freelancer. These experiences have allowed me to develop strong professionalism, confidence, and adaptability in different environments.
Now that I am ready to fully invest my time and energy into modeling again, I am motivated to rebuild my portfolio and collaborate on meaningful projects.
It’s my dream to be a model

Sheena Conhye is a 23-year-old model and multidisciplinary artist based in Rose Hill, Mauritius. With a strong background in CG art, photo retouching, 3D virtual staging, and a keen eye for cinematography and photography, Sheena brings a rare creative depth to every project she’s part of. Her understanding of composition, lighting, movement, and visual storytelling allows her to actively contribute to making photoshoots more creative, intentional, and visually compelling.

Sheena has participated in several fashion shows, including the ADI Fashion Show 2025 and the University of Mauritius Divali Fashion Show 2024, and has been featured in various creative shoots such as boat shoots and a professional shoot with Eagle Insurance. Known for her artistic vision and collaborative mindset, she enjoys exploring unique concepts and pushing creative boundaries on set.

Driven by a passion for fashion and visual art, Sheena aspires to travel the world, experience diverse fashion cultures, and walk runways internationally while continuing to grow as both a model and creative professional.

I’m an aspiring model with no formal experience yet, but I’m very motivated and ready to start building my portfolio. I’m comfortable posing, quick to adapt, and excited to work with creative teams.

I am deeply passionate about fashion and the way clothing can transform and express who we are. My style is unique and versatile, inspired by the late 80s and 90s — an era of bold silhouettes, clean lines, and strong individuality. Fashion allows me to communicate my personality without saying a word, and every outfit becomes a way to tell my story.

I’m driven by creativity, authenticity, and the desire to bring something different to every project. Modelling isn’t just a passion for me — it’s a form of self-expression, a space where I can fully showcase my identity and versatility.

data.bio: I am an aspiring model with an interest in commercial, fashion, and lifestyle work. I am confident in front of the camera, take direction well, and bring a professional and adaptable attitude to every shoot. My goal is to grow within the industry while collaborating with creative teams and brands that value authenticity.

I am currently looking to begin my professional journey in the modeling industry and am eager to gain experience while developing my skills in front of the camera and on set. I am confident, motivated, and open to learning from industry professionals in order to grow and build a strong foundation in modeling.

I bring a positive attitude and reliability to every opportunity. I enjoy expressing different styles, moods, and concepts through photography. I am comfortable taking direction, working with creative teams, and adapting to different environments and projects.

My goal is to gain experience in various areas of modeling, including fashion, glamour and commercial, while continuing to build a strong and versatile portfolio. Joining your professional agency would give me the opportunity to learn, grow, and contribute to creative projects while representing brands with confidence and authenticity.

I am excited about the opportunity to start my modeling career and fully commit to developing within your industry. ✨

I have hands-on experience in runway and commercial modeling. In 2022, I walked the runway for Hennessy as part of Shriyai advertising, gaining valuable exposure to professional fashion shows. I have also done a commercial shoot for KeepCool Gym, and my image was featured on a large promotional banner displayed at Phoenix Mall. Recently, in 2025, I completed a hair shoot for Johaness Spa, further expanding my experience in editorial and beauty modeling. I am confident in front of the camera and continue to grow my skills through diverse modeling projects.

I have worked as a hair model for Sasha Hair Academy, participating in professional styling and  training sessions, and as a  skincare product model for  Yves Rocher, representing  the brand’s natural beauty  image. I have also 
catwalked for multiple stores at Centrepoint Mall, modeling fashion and accessories during live runway shows, demonstrating strong posture, audience 
engagement, and a polished 
runway presence.

I like to learn new thing (has always stayed ready to learn) I like sport - I play football and did athletism 13 yrs till 15 yrs, I like cooking both sweet and salty foods - my inspiration and main goal is Victoria Secret just develop this « inspiration » last year but generally it’s just all the inspo I find on instagram and Pinterest it’s very cool and fun to find new poses and new concepts I think 

I determined myself as a spontaneous, funny and a bit clumsy person who like to talk and listen also xD 

And it’s all about me I think, hope it helps

data.about:
Hi, my name is Lea, and I’ve been a professional model based in Mauritius for the past three years. I’ve had the opportunity to work with a variety of local and international brands, gaining valuable experience across different projects.

In 2024, I was honored to be a Top 5 finalist at Miss Universe Mauritius—an experience that challenged me, inspired me, and helped me grow both personally and professionally.

Modeling is truly my calling; it’s something I could do all year long if I had the chance. While I’m passionate about the craft itself, influencing or content creation isn’t my focus—I prefer to let the work speak for itself.

Outside of modeling, I’m a beach-and-nature lover with a deep love for animals. I share my life with four dogs and two cats, and being close to nature is where I feel most at home.

data.bio: I started to model at a very young age. Developed passion for runways and shooting, career wise I think this is just a way for me to continue having fun in this industry and grow my network connections to develop an event company featuring fashion and experiential events.

I am a law and international relations student at Middlesex University Mauritius, combining academic excellence with a strong presence in the creative and fashion space. 

Alongside my studies, I have worked as a sustainability intern at PwC Mauritius, where I have developed a deep understanding of global issues such as climate change, ESG, and international policy. This intellectual background shapes the way I approach modeling; not just as fashion, but as a platform for expression, influence, and storytelling.

What makes me unique is the contrast I embody. I moves comfortably between the structured world of law and the expressive world of fashion. As a member of the university’s Speaker Society, i have cultivated confidence, articulation, and stage presence ; qualities that translate naturally into strong camera awareness and runway presence.

My aesthetic draws inspiration from classic, vintage, and dark-academia influences, blending elegance with a modern edge. I bring a thoughtful, disciplined, and ambitious mindset to every opportunity, always aiming to represent brands with authenticity, intelligence, and a distinctive identity.

Among many aspiring models, I stand out not only for my look but for the depth behind it. I represent a new generation; individuals who combine style with substance, creativity with intellect, and ambition with purpose.

data.bio:
I am a 19-year-old currently taking a gap year before university, which allows me to fully focus on modeling and be flexible with availability. Modeling has always been one of my career interests, and I am highly motivated to pursue it seriously and professionally.
Although I do not yet have formal industry experience, I have a strong natural presence and distinctive features, and I am especially drawn to runway and high-fashion modeling. I am confident in front of the camera, take direction well, and enjoy expressing movement, structure, and attitude through posing and walk.
What makes me unique is my strong facial structure, versatility, and eagerness to learn. I am disciplined, reliable, and committed to developing my skills through experience and training.
My career aspiration is to build a long-term modeling career, gain experience in runway, editorial, and fashion work, and collaborate with creative teams that allow me to grow and refine my potential within the industry.

Hi, I'm Daksh, a 20 year old photographer and student looking to max out everything in life and trying new experiences. I've had the chance to work for a lookbook project called "Vertigo" and did some fashion shows, runways where i saw myself having a particular interest and doing pretty good at modeling. Alongside my acting backgrounds, i've build up the confidence enough to be in front of an audience and delivering when needed. I see this opportunity as a new experience waiting for me and exploring more on the world of modeling and making connections. This may allow me to different career paths or side gigs while still being young and having the time to do so.

data.name: David
data.bio: I'm David, and I've been modeling for about four years now. What I love most about this work is how every shoot feels like stepping into a completely different world – one day I'm in a sleek suit for a corporate campaign, the next I'm on a beach at sunrise capturing something more raw and natural. I'm drawn to projects that have a story to tell, whether that's through fashion, lifestyle, or editorial work. The collaborative aspect keeps me motivated – working with photographers and creative directors who push me to explore different sides of myself and bring their vision to life. Outside of modeling, I'm pretty active – you'll usually find me at the gym, hiking, or trying out new restaurants around the city. This industry has taught me discipline, helped me build genuine confidence, and shown me how powerful the right image can be in connecting with people.
I am motivated to be part of the modeling industry. I was looking forward for this opportunity eventually I'm studying Diploma in Digital Marketing to be able to move forward .
Myself Govind I'm 22 years of age .... I've done a course on modelling and participated in a fashion show so I can say I'm pretty familiar to modeling
I’m Ravina, a model who loves blending elegance with creativity. From fashion shoots to lifestyle vibes, I bring confidence, style, and a touch of personality to every frame.
data.name: Ravina

data.bio: I’m a new face model exploring the fashion and commercial world with a fresh perspective and a growing passion for visual storytelling. At 173 cm, I carry a clean, minimal aesthetic that translates naturally on camera, and I love experimenting with expressions, movement, and style. I’m still building my portfolio, but I show up with intention, professionalism, and a real eagerness to learn from every creative space I step into. I’m drawn to projects that feel authentic and visually striking, and I’m excited to collaborate with teams who appreciate a motivated beginner ready to evolve, create, and bring something different to the frame.

data.bio: Hello my name is Kimberly, I am 21 years old and I am a university student at polytechniques Mauritius. I am currently studying in the field of tourism and hospitality where I am learning all the operations of how hotels work. I started my modeling journey at the end of December 2025, where I managed to get 2 collab shoots with photographers where I managed to gain experience on how to pose and so on. My goal by the end of 2026, is that I can get a contract with a brand could be cosmetics or fashion brands such as island haze or fashion house. I am eager to learn and I adapt very quickly to any situation.

Modelling is a way for me to express myself.
Capturing emotions through a simple look,facial expressions and using body language all together.
It gives me the opportunity to not only be an artist but to be ART itself-I like to put a lot of accent on my tattoosas well as they are a big part of who I am,even though this style can be considered "atypical" - I believe that with the right tools,being different can be a superpower.
